# RIID-4859: Onboarding Draft-Create Boundary

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/migrationdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to figma-boundary-provenance](../figma-boundary-provenance.md)

This slice absorbs `teamswyg/riido-contracts#54` into the daemon projection. The upstream Figma planning node `432:46849` changes onboarding explanation order to agent draft/configuration, runtime selection, then workspace selection.

## Daemon Boundary

- Local draft state is a client/control-plane fact.
- Final create submit timing is a client/control-plane fact.
- Workspace/runtime selection is a client/control-plane fact.
- Daemon consumes only the final assignment snapshot after SaaS authorization.

## Evidence

- `teamswyg/riido-contracts#54` is included in mirrored upstream coverage provenance.
- `432:46849` stays preserved as non-UI daemon boundary evidence.
- Context/provider-runtime docs state that client-local drafts create no daemon execution or workspace-less provider start path.
- `tools/figmaboundary` keeps the revised onboarding order downstream-only.

This slice does not change daemon runtime behavior, add Figma integration, add SaaS endpoints, create a persisted draft API, create a workspace-less agent create route, or make daemon the owner of onboarding sequence.
